privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a Maven project located at /home/ga/IdeaProjects/data-models containing three Java data model classes. The Person class contains four fields: firstName, lastName, age, and email. The Address class contains five fields: street, city, state, zipCode, and country. The Order class contains five fields: orderId, customerName, items, totalAmount, and orderDate. All classes are created synthetically in setup_task.sh without external data sources.
